creator: carpetsmoker@xs4all.nl
text:
[~]# clanbomber
ClanLib Info(1): X11 Implementation: Fallback to normal XImages. This will be horribly slow! from Sources/Display/Display/X11/display_xwindow.cpp:342
XIO:  fatal IO error 14 (Bad address) on X server ":0.0"
      after 27 requests (24 known processed) with 9 events remaining.
Exit 1

All applications using clanlib 0.6 fail to run (this can be fixed by
modifying the application to use clanlib 0.8 instead of 0.6)
